summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of 3-style BLD trainer completed via Playwright. All 9 feature areas passed: app loads with all data-testids, auto-advance loop via window.__trainer.solveCurrent() correctly increments hud-solved and hud-streak to 5 and rotates the letter pair, skip resets streak to 0 without touching solved, mode switcher swaps CORNER/EDGE 3-STYLE overline, manual moves execute without crash, reset-cube-btn works, settings drawer opens with all controls and corner-buffer-select updates BUFFER label, reset-stats-btn zeros hud-solved, stats drawer shows all 6 stat cards with values persisted to localStorage (bld3style_stats_v1), and bluetooth-connect-btn gracefully shows 'Web Bluetooth not supported' toast and stays on 'Connect Cube'.
critical_code_review_comments: onSuccess uses session.streak in setLifetime closure (line 109) — could go stale under rapid successive calls; using functional setter or prev.bestStreak from setSession would be safer, but observed correctly in tests.
buildCase's 80-try loop could theoretically fail silently (no fallback) if no valid 3-cycle is found; unlikely in practice for 3x3 Speffz but worth guarding.
battery-level span has duplicate 'color' style key (line 225).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Use window.__trainer.solveCurrent() hook to simulate perfect commutator; do not reload between action and assertion. Sticker map has 54 cells (sticker-0..sticker-53). Bluetooth expected to show 'not supported' in headless Playwright — this is correct graceful handling.
